description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a circular wooden fence and lush green lawn, featuring several mature trees distributed evenly around the property. The bungalow itself has a dark gable roof, wooden exterior walls, and a small covered porch at the front. A paved pathway leads from the front gate to the porch, with a bicycle parked near the entrance. To one side of the yard, there is a small outdoor seating area with a table and chairs, set on a stone patio. The windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, and the house is set in a well-maintained, private garden. The overall setting suggests a cozy, suburban residential environment.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a dark gable roof, surrounded by a circular fence, mature trees, and a landscaped yard with a stone patio and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: The bungalow is seen from an angle showing the front porch, main entrance, and a clear view of the stone patio and outdoor seating area to the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facade, porch, and entrance, with the bicycle visible near the door and the stone patio area to the left.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is visible, mostly obscured by trees, with the back yard and part of the stone patio in view.
description_view_3: A side view showing the pathway leading to the porch, the side of the bungalow, and the surrounding trees and fence.
